creator: volker@vwsoft.com
text:
the web PR query interface does not match any PR if you give it a query string in 'Text in single-line fields' of odd length and mark 'Closed reports too'.

It works well if the query string has even length.

How-To-Repeat: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr-summary.cgi

- mark 'Closed reports too'
- give 'gmirror' or 'gmirr' in field 'Text in single-line fields'

result:
No matches to your query

- give 'gmirro' and you're getting results
